docs.name: Flow Field Hero
docs.description: A canvas-rendered hero block. A grid of streamlines traces a summed-sine flow field and bends as you scroll — the field's phase is driven by `window.scrollY`, with a glowing particle at each streamline head. Scroll-driven (not cursor-driven), devicePixelRatio-aware, honors `prefers-reduced-motion` with a static frame, and ships with zero external animation deps beyond `motion`.

props.name: children
props.description: Slotted hero content. Omit for the default headline + CTAs.

props.name: backgroundProps
props.type: { spacing?: number; color?: string; headColor?: string; lineWidth?: number; scrollStrength?: number; speed?: number; className?: string }
props.description: Forwarded to the canvas background layer (`FlowFieldBackground`).

A canvas flow field of streamlines that bend and wave with the page scroll position. Scroll-driven, not cursor-driven — no external deps.

docs.overview: Scroll-driven canvas flow field. The streamline field's phase tracks `window.scrollY`, so the lines bend and wave as the page scrolls; a slow idle drift keeps it alive at rest. `FlowFieldBackground` is a separate export and can be reused under any composition.
